results.rendered_html:
badarī
1 The jujube tree; see bādarāyaṇa.
2 = badarikā (2) above.
3 The cotton shrub.
Comp.
— chadaḥ a kind of perfume.
— tapovanaṃ the penancegrove at Badarī;  Ki. 12. 33. 
— nāthaḥ N. of a temple at Badarī.
— nārāyaṇaḥ N. of a place.
— patraṃ a kind of perfume (naravī).
— phalaṃ a fruit of the jujube tree.
— vanaṃ (ṇaṃ) a wood or thicket of jujube trees.
— vāsā an epithet of Durgā.
— śailaḥ a rocky eminence at Badarī.
